backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend canister with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four terminal-themed UI features with file mappings, component dependencies, and test IDs for portfolio transformation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing terminal/CMD-themed portfolio components, hooks, and styling configurations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with CSS custom properties defining color schemes for light and dark modes using HSL values.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference to main.tsx for the Subodh Ram Portfolio application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component orchestrating the terminal-themed portfolio with Matrix background, scanline overlay, smooth scrolling, and all section components.
frontend/src/components/Achievements.tsx: Achievements section displaying a single achievement in terminal log file format with CMD prompt header and success status indicators.
frontend/src/components/Certifications.t: Certifications section showing Data Analytics certification from ExcelR in CMD 'dir' output format with ASCII box borders.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section formatted as CMD 'ping' output displaying phone, email, LinkedIn, and GitHub contacts in a table with protocol, endpoint, address, and status columns.
frontend/src/components/Education.tsx: Education section displaying four educational qualifications (MCA, BSc IT, HSC, SSC) in CMD 'dir' output format with ASCII tree structure and grades.
frontend/src/components/Experience.tsx: Experience section showing two work experiences (Aivariant intern and Freelance IT Support) formatted as CMD 'netstat' output with responsibilities listed under each role.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright information and a credit link to caffeine.ai with terminal-style styling and command-line aesthetics.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Hero section component featuring a terminal window with typing animations for name, title, and tagline, plus a resume download button that appears after animations complete.
frontend/src/components/NetworkLines.tsx: Canvas-based background animation component that renders falling Matrix-style characters with fade effects and random speeds.
frontend/src/components/PersonalInfo.tsx: Simple section displaying personal information (date of birth) in a terminal-styled box with command-line formatting.
frontend/src/components/Projects.tsx: Projects section displaying three projects (Smart Parking, Property Price Prediction, SmartTech Connect) in a terminal task list format with technologies and features.
Minimal component rendering a fixed overlay div for CRT scanline visual effects.
frontend/src/components/Skills.tsx: Skills section displaying technical skills (programming, databases, networking, tools) and soft skills in terminal-style command output format.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook for managing ICP backend actor instances with authentication, automatically recreating actors when identity changes and invalidating dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file indicating no backend queries are needed since the portfolio uses static hardcoded data.
frontend/src/hooks/useTypingEffect.ts: Custom hook that creates a typewriter animation effect, progressively displaying text character-by-character with configurable speed and start delay.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining a terminal-themed design system with Tailwind imports, custom CSS variables for terminal colors (green, yellow, black, white), monospace font families (Courier Prime), and utility classes for terminal-style boxes, windows, headers, and buttons.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that sets up the root render with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then mounts the App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with terminal color palette (oklch color space), custom animations (accordion, cursor-blink, fade-in, scanline-move), monospace font families, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a portfolio website for Subodh Ram with command-line terminal aesthetic, dark theme with neon highlights, sections for education/projects/skills/achievements, and architectural notes about component structure and responsive design.
